'''âb-d-k''' ('''badaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cackle|cackle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cackle|cackle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| badaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:badakithi|badakithi]] || [[word:badakiji|badakiji]] || [[word:badakishi|badakishi]] || [[word:badaki|badaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badakuthuth|badakuthuth]] || [[word:badakujuj|badakujuj]] || [[word:badakushush|badakushush]] || [[word:badak|badak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badakuthu|badakuthu]] || [[word:badakuju|badakuju]] || [[word:badakushu|badakushu]] || [[word:badaku|badaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badakufuth|badakufuth]] || [[word:badakufuj|badakufuj]] || [[word:badakufush|badakufush]] || [[word:badakuf|badakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:badakethe|badakethe]] || [[word:badakeje|badakeje]] || [[word:badakeshe|badakeshe]] || [[word:badake|badake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:badakothoth|badakothoth]] || [[word:badakojoj|badakojoj]] || [[word:badakoshosh|badakoshosh]] || [[word:badak|badak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:badakotho|badakotho]] || [[word:badakojo|badakojo]] || [[word:badakosho|badakosho]] || [[word:badako|badako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:badakofoth|badakofoth]] || [[word:badakofoj|badakofoj]] || [[word:badakofosh|badakofosh]] || [[word:badakof|badakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:badakĂŠthĂŠ|badakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:badakĂŠjĂŠ|badakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:badakĂŠshĂŠ|badakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:badakĂŠ|badakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:badakathath|badakathath]] || [[word:badakajaj|badakajaj]] || [[word:badakashash|badakashash]] || [[word:badak|badak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:badakatha|badakatha]] || [[word:badakaja|badakaja]] || [[word:badakasha|badakasha]] || [[word:badaka|badaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:badakafath|badakafath]] || [[word:badakafaj|badakafaj]] || [[word:badakafash|badakafash]] || [[word:badakaf|badakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:badakasha|badakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobadakasha|gobadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibadakasha|gokibadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:badaknĂŒsha|badaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobadaknknĂŒsha|gobadaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibadaknĂŒsha|gokibadaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:badakshĂ«sha|badakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobadaknkshĂ«sha|gobadaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibadakshĂ«sha|gokibadakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:badakrosha|badakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadaknkrosha|gobadaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadakrosha|gokibadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:badakmusha|badakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadaknkmusha|gobadaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadakmusha|gokibadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:badaksherasha|badaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobadaknksherasha|gobadaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibadaksherasha|gokibadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:badakngasha|badakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobadaknkngasha|gobadaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibadakngasha|gokibadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:badakyasha|badakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobadaknkyasha|gobadaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibadakyasha|gokibadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:badakyamasha|badakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobadaknkyamasha|gobadaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibadakyamasha|gokibadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:badaknĂŒshĂ«sha|badaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobadaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibadaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badaknĂŒrosha|badaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadaknknĂŒrosha|gobadaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadaknĂŒrosha|gokibadaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badaknĂŒmusha|badaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadaknknĂŒmusha|gobadaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadaknĂŒmusha|gokibadaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:badakshĂ«nĂŒsha|badakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobadaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibadakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badakshĂ«rosha|badakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadaknkshĂ«rosha|gobadaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadakshĂ«rosha|gokibadakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badakshĂ«musha|badakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadaknkshĂ«musha|gobadaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadakshĂ«musha|gokibadakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:badakronĂŒsha|badakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadaknkronĂŒsha|gobadaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadakronĂŒsha|gokibadakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:badakroshĂ«sha|badakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadaknkroshĂ«sha|gobadaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadakroshĂ«sha|gokibadakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:badakromusha|badakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobadaknkromusha|gobadaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibadakromusha|gokibadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:badakmunĂŒsha|badakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobadaknkmunĂŒsha|gobadaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibadakmunĂŒsha|gokibadakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:badakmushĂ«sha|badakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobadaknkmushĂ«sha|gobadaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibadakmushĂ«sha|gokibadakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:badakmurosha|badakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobadaknkmurosha|gobadaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibadakmurosha|gokibadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:badak|badak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠdĂŠk|bĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobadak|hobadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠdĂŠk|hobĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobadak|hohobadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠdĂŠk|hohobĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbadak|nĂŒbadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŒbĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbadak|nĂŒnĂŒbadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbadak|nĂŻbadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŻbĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbadak|nĂŻnĂŻbadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubadak|lubadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠdĂŠk|lubĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubadak|lulubadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠdĂŠk|lulubĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libadak|libadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠdĂŠk|libĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibadak|lilibadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠdĂŠk|lilibĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobadak|kobadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠdĂŠk|kobĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobadak|kokobadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠdĂŠk|kokobĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebadak|kebadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠdĂŠk|kebĂŠdĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebadak|kekebadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠdĂŠk|kekebĂŠdĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
